title: Form 6 – Application for Inclusion in Electoral Roll (National)
description: The official ECI form used by first-time voters to apply for inclusion in the electoral roll.

title: Guidelines for Form 6 – ECI
description: Official ECI guidelines explaining eligibility, residence rules, accepted documents, and filling instructions for Form 6.

title: Delhi Form 6 – CEO Delhi
description: Delhi-specific version of Form 6, confirming any state-level variations.

title: Delhi Form 6 Guide – CEO Delhi
description: Local filling tips, common mistakes, and Delhi-specific instructions for Form 6.

title: National Voter Service Portal (NVSP)
description: Official ECI portal for online voter registration, Form 6 submission, application tracking, and electoral roll search.

title: Voter Portal – ECI
description: ECI's unified portal for voter services including e-EPIC download, application status, and electoral search.

title: Voter Helpline App
description: Official ECI mobile app for voter registration, document upload, application tracking, and e-EPIC download.

title: Election Commission of India – Official Website
description: The main ECI website with information on elections, voter registration, SVEEP initiatives, and official announcements.

title: Electoral Search – ECI
description: Search tool to check if your name is on the electoral roll and find your polling station.

title: Chief Electoral Officer – Delhi
description: Delhi state election authority website with AC lists, AERO contacts, and local voter resources.
